name: Lefroy Resources Ltd.
description: Lefroy Exploration Limited is an active West Australian exploration company focused on expanding and developing its growing gold and critical minerals portfolio. The company’s high-quality assets are located within its flagship Lefroy Project in the Yilgarn Block of Western Australia, a commanding contiguous land package in the heart of the world-class Kalgoorlie-Kambalda mining district. Since its founding in 2016, the company has achieved significant greenfields discoveries and strategic land acquisitions, resulting in a growing mineral resource inventory that includes gold, copper, and nickel deposits. Lefroy is committed to disciplined, innovative, and collaborative exploration practices.
